outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US envoys will head to Pakistan for fresh Iran talks, White House says
outlets.summary: Witkoff and Kushner departing Saturday for Islamabad. Vance on standby. OFAC freezes $344M IRGC/Hezbollah crypto. Hengli sanctions. Iran resumes flights. Brent $105.33.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump dispatches Witkoff and Kushner to Pakistan for new talks with Iran's foreign minister
outlets.summary: White House confirms Saturday departure for Islamabad Round 2. Iran denies direct talks planned. CSIS: 50% of Patriot interceptors expended. Bessent: no oil waivers.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US used roughly half its Patriot interceptors in Iran war, CSIS finds — yearslong rebuild looms
outlets.summary: CSIS: 50% of Patriot interceptors, 50% of THAAD depleted. $24B in munitions in 7 weeks. 1-4 years to restock. Pentagon FY27 $1.5T (war costs excluded).

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Pete Hegseth Declares Iran War 'Gift To The World' As Americans Get Pummeled At Pump
outlets.summary: Hegseth's 'gift to the world' Pentagon briefing juxtaposed with $4.031 gas prices. CSIS warns munitions depletion critical.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Tehran's FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks
outlets.summary: Day 57 liveblog. Araghchi in Islamabad. Iran denies direct US talks. Witkoff/Kushner confirmed Saturday. Iran resumes flights. OFAC crypto freeze. Lebanon ceasefire violations.

outlets.name: BBC / Irish Times
outlets.headline: Hegseth tells US allies 'time for free-riding is over'; fresh Iran talks confirmed
outlets.summary: Hegseth blasts Europe and Asia for 'free-riding' on US Hormuz action. Bessent: no oil waivers. Iran flights resume. Baker Hughes: Hormuz not open until H2 2026.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Palestinians vote in West Bank, part of Gaza for municipal elections
outlets.summary: April 25 liveblog. Palestinian municipal elections (first Gaza vote in 21 years). Netanyahu cancer recovery dominating domestic news. Araghchi in Islamabad. IDF Lebanon ops continue.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israeli Soldiers Testify to Widespread Looting in Lebanon: Commanders Know and Do Nothing
outlets.summary: Investigative report on IDF looting in Lebanon continues to dominate. Netanyahu cancer-free. Ceasefire violations from both sides. Bessent: no oil waivers for Iran.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran resumes international passenger flights from Tehran after 50-day hiatus
outlets.summary: Iran frames flight resumption as recovery and normalization. Flights to Istanbul, Muscat, Beijing. 6 airports reopened. Araghchi on regional tour: Pakistan → Oman → Moscow.

outlets.name: Tasnim News Agency
outlets.headline: Araghchi's trip to Islamabad is not for negotiations with Americans
outlets.summary: IRGC-linked agency downplays US talks. Iran FM spokesperson: 'No meeting planned with US.' Pezeshkian: 'There are no hardliners or moderates — ironclad unity.'
